lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Hey I'm Amy, how may I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: I'm the founder of Mahogany Homes, Gielinor's first Construction company!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: We've currently got branches in Falador, Varrock, Hosidius and Ardougne.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So people contact you for help with their homes?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Yep! They'll get in contact if they want assistance, whether it's fixing parts of their house or requesting nicer furniture, and then we will go and help them out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds quite enjoyable and satisfying to do, are you hiring at all?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: If you have the supplies, I can tell you where one of our clients is that needs some work doing.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: I'll keep track of the work you do as well and give you some points for our company reward shop.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Also there are assistants in Varrock, Ardougne, and Hosidius that can give you work, if Falador is inconvienent for you.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: The clients that I would offer you to go help could be in any of those cities, it might be a bit of a journey to get there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a construction contract.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: What kind of contract would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a beginner contract please?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Please could you go see [client] [area] [city], [location description] for us? You can get another job once you have furnished [his/her] home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a novice contract please?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Please could you go see [client] [area] [city], [location description] for us? You can get another job once you have furnished [his/her] home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have an adept contract please?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Please could you go see [client] [area] [city], [location description] for us? You can get another job once you have furnished [his/her] home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have an expert contract please?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Please could you go see [client] [area] [city], [location description] for us? You can get another job once you have furnished [his/her] home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pass actually.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Hey I'm Amy, how may I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's my current construction contract?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Go see [client] [area] [city], [location description]. You can get another job once you have furnished [his/her] home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How is the company doing?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Pretty good, we've only opened up recently and already have 12 clients!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: These clients are quite indecisive about what they want their houses to look like though, I'm not complaining.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah I've noticed that they seem to keep breaking hatstands all the time too, I'm not sure how easy it is to break a hatstand...

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Very bizarre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm glad you're doing well!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you have a construction cape if you're a master builder?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Well why do you have one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The teleports on it are really handy.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Why would a cape for construction use magic? That seems a bit illogical doesn't it?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: We are people of hard work, not ones that rely on wizardry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose you're right.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, never mind.

sections.title: Selecting "Contract" from her right click menu

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's my current construction contract?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Go see [client] [area] [city], [location description]. You can get another job once you have furnished [his/her] home.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: What kind of contract would you like?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Sorry, Mahogany Homes aren't giving out any contracts during this league.

sections.title: Mahogany, teak, oak, or regular planks

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: That's a plank, you'll need a lot of those.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: That's a saw It's pretty useful.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: That's a fascinating looking saw, it looks like it would break though.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Oh you have have one of my saws, I hope you enjoy it!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: That's a hammer. It's pretty useful.
